name: Dr. Kavita Iyer
bio: Dr. Kavita Iyer established the Edge Intelligence Lab where she designs ultra-low-power embedded systems for agricultural and environmental monitoring. Her group developed a self-powered soil sensor node that harvests RF energy and transmits data over LoRaWAN, deployed across 50 farms in Karnataka. She leads a cross-institutional project on edge-AI for predictive maintenance in industrial IoT, running TinyML models on ARM Cortex-M microcontrollers. Her work on energy-aware task scheduling for edge clusters received the Best Paper award at SenSys.
